title: Oxygen
couldNotConnect: Could not connect to the Oxygen API server.
ensureRunning: Make sure it is running on port 3001.
noCompetitions: No competitions found. Create one below.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete:
useSeparateDbDesc: Connect to a different MySQL host instead of the default server
remoteMeosWarning: The remote server must have a MeOSMain database accessible at this connection
apiKeyPrompt: Enter your club's Eventor API key to browse and import events.
footer: Oxygen v0.1.0 · Connected to MeOS MySQL
cleanUpTitle: Remove soft-deleted competition records and orphaned databases from MySQL
noDeletedRecords: No deleted records to clean up
purgeConfirm: Remove deleted competition records from MySQL?
syncRunnersDetail: Names, club, class, birth year, sex, nationality, SI card
syncFeesDetail: Entry fee, paid amount, and taxable portion from AssignedFee — not overwritten if manually edited
syncBibDetail: Bib number string (e.g. H4 or 123) from results — stored separately from the integer start number
syncRankingDetail: Pre-race ranking score from Eventor entry — stored as initial Rank value
syncResultsDetail: Start time, finish time, and status (OK / DNS / DNF / DSQ etc.) when results are published
syncClassesClubsDetail: Names, age limits, sort order, club contact info
syncWithdrawnDetail: Runners who disappear from Eventor and have no race result are automatically marked as Cancelled (status 21), matching MeOS's StatusCANCEL
syncNoTimingDetail: Classes with TimePresentation=false in Eventor are imported with StatusNoTiming — they appear in start lists but results are not timed
pushResultsDetail: Start time, finish time, running time, status, and placement per runner
pushSplitTimesDetail: Per-control split times matched from SI card + radio punches, including missing and additional punches
pushFeesDetail: Entry fee (Normal/Late type), taxable amount, paid amount, and card rental as ServiceRequest — matching MeOS format
pushPersonDetailsDetail: Birth date, nationality, and bib number per runner
syncStartGroupsDetail: StartTimeAllocationRequest (heat/wave assignments) is not yet imported — deferred for future implementation
syncExplanation: Sync is incremental pull: Oxygen reads data from Eventor, never writes back automatically. Results and Start List can be pushed to Eventor via the buttons above. Fees, registrations, and class setup remain authoritative in Eventor. Existing runners are updated in place. EntrySource is set to the Eventor event ID so the database is compatible with MeOS.
pushStartListComplete: Uploaded start list for {{count}} runners to Test-Eventor.
pushResultsComplete: Uploaded results for {{count}} runners to Test-Eventor.
eventorApiKeyNotConfigured: Eventor API key not configured. Go to the competition selector and connect your key to enable sync.
downloadingRunnerDb: Downloading runner database from Eventor — this may take 30-60 seconds for ~200k runners...
clubSyncDescription: Sync club data and logos from Eventor
liveresultsHelp: Toggle on to automatically create a competition on liveresultat.orientering.se and start pushing results. Controls with "radio" in their name will appear as split times.
swishPaymentMessage: Payment message is auto-generated as "Competition name - Class name"
registrationReceiptPlaceholder: Extra message printed on registration receipts
finishReceiptPlaceholder: Extra message printed on finish receipts
